title: jetstream provider
description: Native OpenTofu/Terraform provider for TP-Link JetStream smart switches (TL-SG2008) driven over TELNET. Manages running-config blocks generically (jetstream_object resource + data source) with a manage-declared-only subset model so declared lines import to 0-diff and unmanaged config is never touched. SSH is unusable (the switch presents only a legacy ssh-dss host key, removed by modern clients) and there is no REST API on this firmware, so telnet was chosen. A minimal telnet client (IAC option refusal, login+enable, paging, prompt framing) is implemented in stdlib — no new Go deps. jetstream_reconcile re-applies a command batch + save unconditionally to heal drift Terraform cannot detect (mirrors the sibling routers' *_reconcile).

phases.title: Core (generic CLI over telnet)
phases.exit_criteria: Builds, vets, tests; one resource + data source manage any running-config block to 0-diff.

items.feature: Minimal telnet client (stdlib net): IAC NVT option negotiation (refuse all — DO->WONT, WILL->DONT, skip SB), User:/Password: login + enable (no enable password), 'Press any key to continue' paging answered with a space, command/prompt framing; single mutex-serialized session, lazy connect, heal-on-error, running-config cached + invalidated on write. No new Go deps.

Running-config block parser (context -> normalized body lines), robust to indented or flush-left bodies with #/!/blank separators; command renderers (applyCommands/removeCommands/negate); whitespace-insensitive line normalization.

jetstream_object resource (CRUD + ImportState): apply declared lines under a context -> save; snapshot prior block; restore-on-destroy negates only added lines (adoption-safe); add/drop lines handled in Update.
Manage-declared-only drift: lineSubsetMatches plan modifier (every declared line present in the live block -> 0-diff; unmanaged config never clobbered).
jetstream_object data source (read one block's lines+present, or whole 'show running-config').
jetstream_reconcile resource: unconditional config command batch + save per triggers change (heals drift Terraform cannot detect).

Unit tests: processTelnet (IAC parse incl. split sequences), parseRunningConfig (flush-left + indented fixtures), endsWithPrompt, isPagingPrompt, cleanOutput, applyCommands/removeCommands/negate, line subset/set math, contextID; plus a localhost TCP fake-switch integration test of login+enable+paging+read.

phases.title: Wiring + adoption
phases.exit_criteria: Released to the Semaphore mirror; net/switches/tplink imports the shop JetStream to 0-diff.

items.feature: make check green (tidy+fmt+vet+test+build); .githooks/pre-commit gate; pushed to main.
Release linux_amd64 to the Semaphore filesystem_mirror on CT 74235 (registry.terraform.io/jamesonrgrieve/jetstream/<ver>/linux_amd64), sha256-verified.
NetBox: model shop-jetstream (device 12) natively — VLANs 1/2/3, ports 1/0/1..8 with mode/untagged/tagged, SVIs (interface vlan 1/2/3) + IPs.
net/switches/tplink/ module mirroring net/switches/hpe/: NetBox readers -> CLI-line render -> jetstream_object for_each; import-first to 0-diff via Semaphore (plan-only). STOP before apply.

phases.title: Ergonomics + release
phases.exit_criteria: Optional typed sugar; CI; registry publish.

items.feature: Typed sugar resources (jetstream_vlan / jetstream_port / jetstream_svi) over the generic core, if an ergonomics need emerges.
CI (build/vet/test) + GoReleaser + registry publish + docs gen.
